name: Late Smti Synchar Phawa
bio: The matriarch and founder of the Phawa Ialih lineage. A woman of great strength and wisdom who laid the foundation for generations to come.
funFact: Known for her legendary hospitality — no visitor ever left her home without a meal.

name: Late Smti Durka Phawa
bio: Eldest daughter of Synchar Phawa. Carried forward the matrilineal traditions with grace and dignity.
hobbies: Cooking traditional Khasi dishes, singing folk songs
funFact: Could cook for 50 people without breaking a sweat during family gatherings.

name: Late Shri Chabi Phawa
bio: Son of Synchar Phawa. A quiet but dependable figure in the family.
funFact: Built most of the furniture in the family home with his own hands.

name: Late Shri Yata Phawa
bio: Son of Synchar Phawa. Known for his jovial nature.
funFact: Never lost a game of cards — or so he claimed!

name: Late Shri Ton Phawa
bio: Son of Synchar Phawa. The youngest of the siblings.
funFact: Had a pet dog that followed him everywhere for 15 years.

name: Late Smti Blit Phawa (Long Ialih)
bio: Known as Long Ialih, she was the bridge between the old generation and the new. Married twice, she raised a large and loving family.
funFact: Her nickname 'Long Ialih' came from her unusually tall stature for her time.

name: Late Shri Pila Phawa
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. A hardworking and dedicated family man.
funFact: Could identify every tree in the forest by just looking at its leaf.

name: Late Shri Mison Phawa
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. Known for his gentle demeanor.
funFact: Played the flute so beautifully that birds would gather to listen.

name: Late Shri Min Phawa
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. The quiet thinker of the family.
funFact: Could solve complex math problems mentally before calculators existed.

name: Late Smti Kongka Phawa
bio: Eldest daughter of Blit Phawa. A strong matriarch who continued the family legacy with her husband Lakhon Ryngkhlem.
funFact: Was the first woman in the village to own a sewing machine.

name: Shri Jill Phawa
bio: Son of Blit Phawa. A dependable and caring brother.
funFact: Won every race at the village sports meet for 5 consecutive years.

name: Smti Durka Phawa
bio: Daughter of Blit Phawa. Married to Shri Klori Chyrmang, she raised six wonderful children.
funFact: Her garden was so beautiful that people from neighboring villages came to see it.

name: Late Shri Bhom Phawa
bio: Son of Blit Phawa. Known for his strength and courage.
funFact: Once lifted a fallen tree trunk to save a trapped calf.

name: Late Shri Kalein Phawa
bio: Son of Blit Phawa. A man of few words but deep wisdom.
funFact: Could predict the weather accurately just by observing cloud patterns.

name: Shri Phirik Phawa
bio: Son of Blit Phawa. The tech-savvy one of his generation.
funFact: Fixed the village's first radio and became the local 'tech support'.

name: Smti Klaw Phawa
bio: Daughter of Blit Phawa. Married to Shri Dawanheipor Shylla, she raised six children with love and discipline.
funFact: Taught half the children in the village to read and write.

name: Smti Healing Soul Phawa
bio: Daughter of Kongka Phawa. Her name reflects her nurturing spirit. Married to Shwalang Rymbai.
funFact: Her herbal remedies were sought after by people from three neighboring villages.

name: Shri Stepping Stone Phawa
bio: Son of Kongka Phawa. A man who believed in paving the way for others.
funFact: Built the first concrete pathway in the village with his own hands.

name: Shri Chabi Phawa
bio: Son of Kongka Phawa. Named after his great-granduncle.
funFact: Scored the winning goal in the district football championship.

name: Mr. Damang Hiwotmi Phawa
bio: Son of Kongka Phawa. A modern thinker with traditional roots.
funFact: Has visited 15 states in India and documented each journey.

name: Miss Larishisha Ika Phawa
bio: Daughter of Kongka Phawa. A bright and ambitious young woman.
funFact: Her TikTok dance videos have over 100K views!

name: Late Mr. Kamwamut Phawa
bio: Son of Kongka Phawa. Gone too soon but remembered fondly.
funFact: Wrote over 50 poems about village life before he turned 25.

name: Mr. Hilldy Phawa (Chirup)
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. Also known as Chirup Phawa.
funFact: Built his first computer from spare parts at age 14.

name: Miss Dawankabhah Phawa (Ruit Liek)
bio: Daughter of Durka Phawa. Known as Ruit Liek among friends.
funFact: Designs traditional Khasi attire with a modern twist.

name: Mr. Wanmiki Phawa (Ma bi)
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. Nicknamed Ma bi.
funFact: His secret pork recipe is guarded more closely than family heirlooms.

name: Mr. Lakhon Phawa
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. A calm and collected individual.
funFact: Can recite passages from the Bhagavad Gita from memory.

name: Mr. Borlang Phawa (Dell)
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. Known as Dell among his tech circle.
funFact: Has built over 20 custom PCs for friends and family.

name: Mr. Pila Phawa
bio: Son of Durka Phawa. Named after his great-granduncle.
funFact: Can do 100 pushups without stopping.

name: Miss Shylpha Phawa
bio: Daughter of Klaw Phawa. A creative soul with big dreams.
funFact: Composed her first song at age 12 and performed it at a school function.

name: Mr. Ehokmitre D Phawa
bio: Son of Klaw Phawa. The 'D' stands for his middle name.
funFact: Owns over 50 pairs of sneakers and counting.

name: Mr. Wyrchawmitre D Phawa
bio: Son of Klaw Phawa. Twin brother of Ehokmitre.
funFact: Can finish a Rubik's cube in under 2 minutes.

name: Late Mr. Lehachwami Phawa
bio: Son of Klaw Phawa. Remembered for his kindness.
funFact: Could identify over 100 bird species by their calls alone.

name: Miss DK Fami Phawa
bio: Daughter of Klaw Phawa. DK stands for her initials.
funFact: Was crowned Miss Village Festival in 2019.

name: Mr. Kamjuhbiangki Phawa
bio: Son of Klaw Phawa. The youngest of his siblings.
funFact: His graffiti art can be seen on several walls in Shillong.

name: Miss Kongka Phawa
bio: Daughter of Healing Soul Phawa. Named after her grandmother.
funFact: Won the state-level debate competition twice.

name: Mr. Manha-O Phawa (Thor)
bio: Son of Healing Soul Phawa. Known as Thor for his strength and love for Marvel comics.
funFact: Can bench press 100kg and has watched every Marvel movie at least 3 times.
